info.title: Arka.fund Catalog and NAV API
info.description: Public, read-only indexed data for Arka discovery, NAV, assets, managers, activity and operational monitoring. Exact monetary values are returned as integer strings to preserve on-chain precision.

tags.name: Arkas
tags.description: Arka vault discovery and portfolio data.

tags.name: Dashboard
tags.description: Aggregates used by the public app.

get.description: Returns the canonical snapshot-backed NAV aggregate, denomination totals, valuation state and indexer monitoring state. Use the activity endpoints for live contract events.

503.description: The latest indexed snapshot is unavailable.

get.description: Returns sync freshness, indexed/failing Arka counts and active monitoring alerts. Critical alerts produce HTTP 503.

503.description: Indexer has no snapshot or a critical alert is active.
The latest indexed snapshot is unavailable.

get.description: Returns paginated Arkas. Use curated=true and delisted=false for the public platform listing.

503.description: The latest indexed snapshot is unavailable.

put.description: Saves public Arka profile metadata after verifying a Stellar signature from the current Arka manager.

400.description: The signed profile payload is invalid or expired.

403.description: The signer is not authorized to update this profile.

503.description: The latest indexed snapshot is unavailable.
The latest indexed snapshot is unavailable.
The latest indexed snapshot is unavailable.

get.description: Returns the latest OracleGuard result for each asset observed by the catalog. Unavailable prices include an explicit status and reason and are never replaced by a guessed value.

200.description: Current asset prices and oracle state.

503.description: The latest indexed snapshot is unavailable.

200.description: Current asset price and oracle state.

503.description: The latest indexed snapshot is unavailable.
The latest indexed snapshot is unavailable.

get.summary: List Arkas with an asset exposure

503.description: The latest indexed snapshot is unavailable.
The latest indexed snapshot is unavailable.

put.description: Saves public manager profile metadata after verifying a signature from the manager wallet.

400.description: The signed profile payload is invalid or expired.

403.description: The signer is not authorized to update this profile.

503.description: The latest indexed snapshot is unavailable.
The latest indexed snapshot is unavailable.

parameters.description: Number of recent activity records used in aggregates.
